title: Canonical Unit (CUID) Evidence Model - Rigveda
principle: The only metric that matters: can this canonical unit be proven from independent evidence? Nothing without an evidence chain. Nothing assumed. Everything falsifiable.

cuid_schema.variant_classification_policy: Never call a difference a textual variant until every simpler explanation is eliminated: encoding > OCR > accent-mark omission > word-segmentation > orthographic > editorial normalization > THEN recensional/manuscript variant.

family_collapse_rules: Aufrecht 1863 GRETIL TEI, VNH layer in VedaWeb, any Unicode re-encoding of Aufrecht, and any OCR of Aufrecht -> ALL collapse to F-AUFRECHT (1 family).
VedaWeb Lubotsky layer (not its aufrecht/vnh reference layers, not its zurich ISO transliteration) -> F-LUBOTSKY (1 family, independent).
Chowkhamba 1973, Ramtek/KKSU, Gita Press Devanagari -> F-CHOWKHAMBA / F-RAMTEK-KKSU / F-GITAPRESS-REGIONAL, all derived from F-AUFRECHT (0 new independent families).
Sayana OCR sets -> F-SAYANA (commentarial, 0 samhita-independent families).
VedaWeb zurich layer = transliteration of Lubotsky, NOT a new family.
VedaWeb oldenberg/geldner/grassmann/macdonell/griffith/elizarenkova layers = cited reference translations/notes, NOT independent samhita witnesses.

paradigm_cuid_set.scope: RV Mandala 1, Sukta 1 (9 verses) - extracted only from the 2 collatable independent bases
paradigm_cuid_set.extraction_method: Aufrecht via xml:id RV_1.001.N + <l n=...a/c> with <orig> accents preserved; Lubotsky via VedaWeb b01_h001_N_lubotsky layer. VNH/aufrecht/zurich reference layers excluded as non-independent.

verification_example.canonical_text: a:a̱gnim ī̍ḻe pu̱rohi̍taṁ ya̱jñasya̍ de̱vam ṛ̱tvija̍m |

aufrecht: a:a̱gnim ī̍ḻe pu̱rohi̍taṁ ya̱jñasya̍ de̱vam ṛ̱tvija̍m |

key_observations: Lubotsky segments RV 1.1.1 as 3 padas (a/c/p tristubh convention) while Aufrecht uses 2 (a/c). This is SEGMENTATION, recorded as class='segmentation', NOT a textual variant.
Accent placement differs (Lubotsky 'agnim ile puróhitam' vs Aufrecht 'agnim ile purohitam' with accents) - class='accent', editorial/encoding, not a recensional variant.
No genuine RECENSIONAL word variants observed in RV 1.1 between the 2 bases - consistent with prior (now qualified) stability claim, but N=9 is far below a certifiable sample.

quality_gate_RV.VERDICT: EVIDENCE INCOMPLETE - cannot be declared a verified Digital Critical Edition until >=1 more independent samhita base (clean Max Muller and/or Oldenberg-Schmidt) is collated across the full text.

scaling_plan.step1: Apply paradigm extractor to all 10,552 verses across F-AUFRECHT + F-LUBOTSKY -> baseline CUID set with 2-base evidence chains.
scaling_plan.step2: Acquire 1-2 more independent bases (priority: clean Max Muller, Oldenberg-Schmidt apparatus) -> raise independent_families to >=3 before any 'verified' label.
scaling_plan.step3: Collate independent families only; classify every difference per variant_classification_policy; emit variant registry.
scaling_plan.step4: Assign confidence per CUID from independent_families + agreement + critical-edition support; never from file count.
scaling_plan.step5: Re-run falsification: challenge 'stable'/'verified' claims; downgrade any CUID lacking >=2 independent families.
scaling_plan.note: Bounded, auditable pipeline. NOT executed as an unbounded loop in one turn; each step checkpointed and reviewed.
